case_title: MERCURY TOURS VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MERCURY TOURS AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-28-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-31-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. "PLAINTIFF HAS NOT FILED THE REQUIRED GOVERNMENT WITH DEFENDANT, CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY DONALD WOODS--OPERATION MANAGER. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JOE ABAD--ADJUSTER FOR CCSF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCURY TOURS
